inputs.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z Research Guide — Best Research Order, Peace Shield, and T10 Path
inputs.approval_note: Owner-approved research guidance for intake only: the first screen may mention T10/UST, but must not imply Field Research is required before pursuing T10. Canonical priority is Hero Training to Cockpit, Military Strategies, Peace Shield/Urgent Rescue, then a goal-based decision: shortest practical UST/T10 path for tier progression, or Siege to Seize into Field Research only for late-game Recharge Shield/deep combat scaling.
